article_title: Saronic Closes $1.75 Billion Series D at $9.25 Billion Valuation as Autonomous Warship Maker Scales Production for the U.S. Navy

content_preview.title: Saronic Closes $1.75 Billion Series D at $9.25 Billion Valuation as Autonomous Warship Maker Scales Production for the U.S. Navy
content_preview.summary: Kleiner Perkins leads the largest defense tech raise of 2026, more than doubling Saronic's valuation as the company expands shipyards and targets 20 vessels a year by 2027.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Saronic Technologies, the Austin-based maker of autonomous warships, has closed a $1.75 billion Series D round at a post-money valuation of $9.25 billion, according to a [company press release](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/saronic-closes-1-75b-series-d-at-9-25b-valuation-to-accelerate-a-new-era-of-maritime-autonomy-302729238.html). The round, led by Kleiner Perkins, more than doubles the $4 billion valuation Saronic reached after its $600 million Series C in early 2025, ...
